notes: This validates a synthetic player.hpl-like text round-trip based on recovered DungeonUser.Load/Save text evidence.
It also feeds parsed nonzero UserAttribute names into the recovered CardFinder fixture.
It does not validate against a real player.hpl file or emulate Unity PlayerPrefs/storage.

requirements.reward_text: Gain access to the Execute card
Gain access to the Pickpocket card
Gain access to the Second Thoughts card
Gain access to the Divine Inspiration card
Gain access to the Desperate Strike card
Gain access to the Sift card

enum_only_note.basis: UserAttribute contains WINCHAOS next to WINCHAOS2/FLOOR1_CHAOS/CHAOS_HS, and ProfessionChaosMage exists, but AchievementList.GetAchievementList has no WINCHAOS row.
enum_only_note.inferred_condition: likely clear the dungeon as Chaos Mage

enum_only_note.basis: UserAttribute contains WINCHAOS next to WINCHAOS2/FLOOR1_CHAOS/CHAOS_HS, and ProfessionChaosMage exists, but AchievementList.GetAchievementList has no WINCHAOS row.
enum_only_note.inferred_condition: likely clear the dungeon as Chaos Mage

enum_only_note.basis: UserAttribute contains WINCHAOS next to WINCHAOS2/FLOOR1_CHAOS/CHAOS_HS, and ProfessionChaosMage exists, but AchievementList.GetAchievementList has no WINCHAOS row.
enum_only_note.inferred_condition: likely clear the dungeon as Chaos Mage

enum_only_note.basis: UserAttribute contains WINCHAOS2 next to WINCHAOS/FLOOR1_CHAOS/CHAOS_HS, and ProfessionChaosMage exists, but AchievementList.GetAchievementList has no WINCHAOS2 row.
enum_only_note.inferred_condition: likely reduce the final boss under the champion-health threshold as Chaos Mage, matching other *2 profession gates

remaining_gaps: This is a CardFinder candidate/weight analysis, not byte-accurate list/RNG replay.
User achievement state is explicit fixture input; original GameManager/current-user save loading and RNG stream position are not replayed here.
Utility.RoundRandom is represented structurally; this fixture has zero starting elemental counts, so DungeonPlayer.FrequencyMod contributes 0 for the default Warrior floor-1 analysis.
Spawn counts are normalized through Card.BaseName, but this analysis still uses a static input map rather than replaying Dungeon.SpawnCard after every selected reward.
